isValidSignature(bytes32,bytes).details: Azuro V3 calls this when `bettor` is this singleton. `signature` is the tipster EOA      signature over the EIP-712 order digest (`orderHash`).

prepareVaultBet(uint256,uint128,uint128,.details: USDT never leaves the singleton. The tipster signs the EIP-712 order off-chain;      Azuro Core validates via `isValidSignature` on this contract.

params.orderHash: `hashTypedData` digest of the Azuro `ClientBetData` the tipster will sign.

params.pubKeyX: First 32 bytes of the uncompressed secp256k1 public key.
params.pubKeyY: Second 32 bytes of the uncompressed secp256k1 public key.

cancelVaultBetPreparation(uint256).notice: Cancel a prepared vault bet and restore vault free balance.

completeVaultBet(uint256,address,uint256.notice: Record an Azuro bet NFT that the relayer minted to this singleton.

deployer().notice: Closed mainnet test gate — only whitelisted EOAs may use user-facing entry points.

lookupTipsterByName(string).notice: Resolve a registered tipster handle to a wallet address.

prepareVaultBet(uint256,uint128,uint128,.notice: Reserve vault liquidity for an Azuro V3 relayer bet (`bettor` = this contract).

recoverOrphanVaultBet(uint256,address,ui.notice: Link an Azuro bet NFT already minted to this singleton when preparation was         cancelled after the relayer accepted (e.g. client failed to read `betId`).

registerTipsterName(string,bytes32,bytes.notice: Claim a unique display name shown as @name in the app.

removeWhitelistAddress(address).notice: Revoke closed-test access for a wallet.

tipsterPubKeyX(address).notice: Uncompressed secp256k1 public key (x, y) for Pear / DH discovery.

whitelistAddress(address).notice: Allow a wallet to create vaults, register names, deposit, bet, etc.
